buildprint-agent-contract.mission: Build the selected production-grade scope. Scope may be limited, but included capabilities must be real, wired, persistent where relevant, and QA-tested.

must.rule: Exclude or block capabilities that cannot be implemented for real.
Persist product data through a durable adapter when persistence is claimed.
Run tests, build, runtime QA, persistence/restart QA when relevant, and no-fake implementation scan before claiming done.
Report concrete evidence: commands, outputs, URLs, screenshots, artifacts, blockers.

must-not.rule: Do not count mocks or fixtures as product implementation.
Do not create placeholder routes, route-shaped links, no-op controls, fake success states, or coming-soon surfaces inside included scope.
Do not count skeleton adapters as implemented providers, exports, queues, auth, billing, email, webhook, upload, or external APIs.
Do not use in-memory-only storage for product data if persistence is claimed.
Do not invent validation results or claim done without evidence.
Do not expand scope without recording the decision and required QA.

stop-if.condition: Required provider credentials are missing for an included live provider.
An included capability would need to be mocked or stubbed to continue.
A required route/control cannot be made real.
Persistence is claimed but no durable implementation path is available.
Tests, build, or runtime QA cannot run and no honest blocker is recorded.

phase.name: Load contract
phase.exit: Read order complete and active constraints known.

phase.name: Scaffold
phase.exit: Included routes/modules exist with no placeholders.

phase.name: Contracts
phase.exit: Schemas, APIs, data, providers, jobs, and side effects are wired or excluded.

phase.name: Behavior
phase.exit: Included capabilities perform real state changes or real external behavior.

phase.name: Verification
phase.exit: Build/tests/runtime QA/no-fake scan pass or blockers documented.

phase.name: Report
phase.exit: Implementation report written with evidence and gaps.

done-criteria.criterion: Build passes or blocker is explicit.
Tests pass or blocker is explicit.
Runtime QA evidence exists for product/app/feature scope.
Persistence/restart proof exists when product state exists.
Final report lists commands, artifacts, completed included capabilities, excluded capabilities, and remaining gaps.
